TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Yohae' ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 61 buwan, 187 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 182 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 5 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, saySiyat55%, Tayan39%, Paywan1%, Setik1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Yohae' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Yohae hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Yohae hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Yohae hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Yohae' hya' ga Ip'ipa'an bato. tay 'llaw na Yohae' hya' ga Maybalay. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ joħaeʔ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu ɣpħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, s~ɕajs~ɕijat**%, tajan**%, pajwan*%, s~ɕetik*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na joħaeʔ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na joħae ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na joħae ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na joħae ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na joħaeʔ ħjaʔ ɣa ipʔipaʔan βato. taj ʔllaw na joħaeʔ ħjaʔ ɣa majβalaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Yohae' ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 61 buwan, 187 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 182 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 5 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, saySiyat55%, Tayan39%, Paywan1%, Setik1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Yohae' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Yohae hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Yohae hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Yohae hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Yohae' hya' ga Ip'ipa'an bato. tay 'llaw na Yohae' hya' ga Maybalay. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ joħaeʔ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu ɣpħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, s~ɕajs~ɕijat**%, tajan**%, pajwan*%, s~ɕetik*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na joħaeʔ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na joħae ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na joħae ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na joħae ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na joħaeʔ ħjaʔ ɣa ipʔipaʔan βato. taj ʔllaw na joħaeʔ ħjaʔ ɣa majβalaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
